sourcesContent:
import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; import styles from '../styles/inlineStyles'; import { FaBookOpen, FaCalendarAlt, FaChartLine, FaClipboardList, FaQuestionCircle, FaRegFileAlt, FaChalkboardTeacher, FaLayerGroup, FaUserCircle } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); const iconBox = { width: '46px', height: '46px', borderRadius: '18px', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0b3d91 0%, #1e40af 100%)', boxShadow: '0 18px 40px rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.18)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', color: 'white', flex: '0 0 auto' }; const cardStyle = { cursor: 'pointer', padding: '18px 18px', display: 'flex', gap: '16px', alignItems: 'center', textAlign: 'left' }; const titleStyle = { margin: 0, fontSize: '18px' }; const descStyle = { margin: '6px 0 0 0', color: 'rgba(11,31,59,0.7)', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: '13px' }; return (

Welcome, {user?.name}!

Choose an option. The whole UI uses a navy/white professional style.

{user?.role}
{user?.role === 'student' && ( <>

Study Planner

Create and manage your study plans

Progress Tracking

View your learning progress

Study Materials

Download study materials

Q&A Forum

Ask and answer questions

MCQ Practice

Take mock exams

Book Tutor

Schedule sessions with tutors

)} {user?.role === 'tutor' && ( <>

Manage Subjects

Create and manage subjects and topics

Upload Materials

Upload study materials

Create MCQ

Create mock exam questions

My Appointments

Manage student appointments

)} {user?.role === 'admin' && ( <>

Manage Users

View and manage all users

Manage Subjects

Manage all subjects and topics

Analytics

View platform analytics

)}
); }; export default Dashboard;
